title: AKC Episode Log Record
description: One line of an AKC episode log (append-only JSONL, one record per line). See ADR-0002.

ts.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp assigned at write time.

type.description: Event category. Lowercase identifier chosen by the adapter (e.g. 'session', 'action', 'observation', 'insight').

data.description: Adapter-owned payload. AKC does not constrain this shape; downstream distillation is responsible for interpreting it.
